name: signed-checkpoint script writes a checkpoint after every 100 audit log entries per the merkle-chained audit log contract
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && for i in $(seq 1 100); do printf '{"event":"e%d"}\n' "$i" >> compliance/audit.log; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints --interval 100 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-100.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
